summary: Tested PMM redesign: 15/15 backend tests passed (health, quote w/ validation, tracking, branches+filters+coverage, invoices, posts, services, leads w/ MongoDB persistence). Frontend e2e verified: Home hero+navbar+WhatsApp FAB, cotizador (03100→64620, 2.5kg, estandar) returns total $268.53/IVA $37.04/3 días, rastreo PMM-12345678 returns timeline, cobertura lists 16 sucursales and filters Guadalajara→1, servicios empresas/personas show 4 cards each, guias-prepagadas shows 3 plans, blog lists 4 posts and post detail renders, sucursales lists 16, facturacion PMM-001 returns invoice, contacto shows contact-success. SEO meta: title/description/canonical/og:image/twitter:card=summary_large_image present in /, /blog/:slug (JSON-LD Article), /sucursales (JSON-LD @graph LocalBusiness). robots.txt and sitemap.xml return 200. No MongoDB _id leaks in any response. CTA cta-cotizar-nav navigates correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); consider migrating to FastAPI lifespan context manager (non-blocking, cosmetic).
Lead.email is plain str (not EmailStr) so email validation is not enforced server-side; EmailStr is imported but unused. Minor.
calculate_quote uses a flat formula and a +75 base; ensure pricing matches business expectations before going past prototype (mocked, by design).
test_credentials: Not required (public marketing site, no auth).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 16 sucursales and 4 blog posts on startup if collections are empty. A TEST_User lead was created via API as part of leads test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_pmm_api.py uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend data-testid prefixes: branch-{id}, service-{key}, sucursal-{id}, plan-{key}. JSON-LD on /sucursales uses @graph wrapper (LocalBusiness items inside). Mocked endpoints: /api/quote, /api/tracking/{guia}, /api/invoices/{folio}. Real persistence only for /api/leads.
